items.description: A new Look-and-Feel (LaF) for Java, which allows for a grid-based display of Unicode characters with custom fore/background colors, font sizes, and pseudo-shaders. Originally designed for developing Roguelike/lite games.

items.name: WraithEngine
items.description: A free, open source, Java game engine library built on top of LWJGL. Designed to act as a use-exactly-what-you-need, no-assumptions framework, WraithEngine is versatile enough to act as a library within other tools or projects, or a full fledged standalone game engine.
